---
title: Project Appendix Plain
format: html
_quarto:
  tests:
    html:
      noErrors: true
      ensureHtmlElements:
        - ["div#quarto-appendix.plain", "section#quarto-reuse"]
        - ["div#quarto-appendix.default"]
---

This document inherits `appendix-style: plain` and `license` from `_quarto.yml`.
The appendix container should have class "plain", not "default".
